stepDescriptions.takk-for-bestillingen: Send confirmation of the received order to the customer.
stepDescriptions.ansvarsrett: Send declaration of responsibility with attachments to the relevant parties.
stepDescriptions.godkjent-byggesoknad: Send notice of the approved building application.
stepDescriptions.opprett-sjekklister: Confirm that checklists have been created for the project.
stepDescriptions.la-til-foretak: Confirm that parties have been added.
stepDescriptions.send-paaminnelse: Set the date for the customer reminder.
stepDescriptions.epost-kommende-kontroll: Notify parties of the upcoming inspection — or transfer without sending.
stepDescriptions.innhenting-av-dokumentasjon: Send a documentation request per party — or transfer without sending.
stepDescriptions.kontroll-dato: Set the inspection date and assign an inspector — or transfer without inspection.
stepDescriptions.kontrollerklaering: Generate the control declaration (PDF) and send it to the parties.
stepDescriptions.sluttrapport: Generate the final report (PDF) and send it to the parties.
stepDescriptions.utfort: Complete the project and send the closing report.

panel.subject: Subject
panel.previewError: Could not load the preview. You can still fill it in and send manually.
panel.multiHint: Edit the email per party. Each selected party receives its own email.
panel.skipInspectionHint: Mark the step as completed without scheduling an inspection.
panel.calendarInviteHint: Notify the inspector with a calendar invitation.
panel.openPdfNewTab: Open PDF in a new tab

errors.noPreview: No preview available for this step
errors.noAction: No action defined for this step
errors.noEmailEndpoint: No email endpoint defined for this step
errors.noTransferEndpoint: No transfer endpoint defined for this step
